name: codex-orchestration
description: Configure Codex once so the selected task model leads while efficient models handle delegated execution.

interface.longDescription: Keep the selected task model as Codex's orchestrator, optionally add a root-facing plan advisor, and persist an efficient executor route through Codex's own multi-agent configuration.
defaultPrompt: /codex-orchestration setup executor: GPT-5.6 Luna Extra High
